channel.title: Index on PACTUS CHARTS
channel.description: Recent content in Index on PACTUS CHARTS

item.title: Network Health
item.description:
Network Health #

Number of block committed #

All Time #

Last 30 Days #

Number of transactions committed #

All Time #

Last 30 Days #

Transaction Fee Accumulation #

All Time #

Last 30 Days #

Active Validators Per Day #

All Time #

item.title: Relationship Last 1 Day
item.description:
Relationship Last 1 Day #

On-chain Communities Relationship Graph

Communities CSV

Legend: Dot represent regular accounts, square represent validator addresses. Triangles represent regular accounts hat have interacted with known public addresses.

Edge thickness indicates interaction volume, which combines amounts from all operations: transfer, reward, bond, withdraw.

A community represents a group of related addresses that interact with each other during a specific time period, but this does not necessarily mean they belong to the same person. The on-chain relationship graph has already excluded some known public addresses.

    1. pc1zfs7rjxa5vuyrppuhz9da5klq6ujakz8x06xvrz - 343.0001 PAC - (1.210870%)

Last 180 Day Total Withdraw Receiver Addresses Top 500 #

488073.5101 PAC total

item.title: Relationship Last 7 Day
item.description:
Relationship Last 7 Day #

On-chain Communities Relationship Graph

Communities CSV

Legend: Dot represent regular accounts, square represent validator addresses. Triangles represent regular accounts hat have interacted with known public addresses.

Edge thickness indicates interaction volume, which combines amounts from all operations: transfer, reward, bond, withdraw.

A community represents a group of related addresses that interact with each other during a specific time period, but this does not necessarily mean they belong to the same person. The on-chain relationship graph has already excluded some known public addresses.

item.title: Important Balances
item.description:
The charts on this page record balance changes of key accounts.

Please note that when an account has no transactions, the chart will not display corresponding graphics.

Exchange Balances #

Exchange account chart balance does not include balances from uncollected addresses.

  • Xeggex Exchange
  • Azbit Exchange
  • Exbitron Exchange
  • Tradeogre Exchange
  • Wrapto Withdraw
  • Wrapto Lock
  • Coinstore Exchange

Genesis Account Balances #

  • Foundation (deprecation)
  • VC Allocation
  • Team and Operations (deprecation)
  • Community

Team Account Balances #

Edge thickness indicates interaction volume, which combines amounts from all operations: transfer, reward, bond, withdraw.

A community represents a group of related addresses that interact with each other during a specific time period, but this does not necessarily mean they belong to the same person. The on-chain relationship graph has already excluded some known public addresses.

Legend: Dot represent regular accounts, square represent validator addresses. Triangles represent regular accounts hat have interacted with known public addresses.

Edge thickness indicates interaction volume, which combines amounts from all operations: transfer, reward, bond, withdraw.

A community represents a group of related addresses that interact with each other during a specific time period, but this does not necessarily mean they belong to the same person. The on-chain relationship graph has already excluded some known public addresses.
